data.title: 4DMedical receives CE Mark for CT:VQ™, enabling commercial launch across the European Union
data.description: Today, 4DMedical Limited (ASX:4DX) announced securing A$83 million in private placement funding to drive growth efforts, particularly for expansion in Europe. The company, based in Melbourne, Australia, is a top global player in the cardiothoracic field.

data.title: Sesame Oil Market Size to Reach USD 6,978.82 Mn by 2032 with the CAGR 4.76% with Rising Clean-Label Demand, Says Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 30, 2026, reports suggest positive growth prospects for the global Sesame Oil market, with a valuation of USD 5,038.39 million in 2025. Projections indicate a significant upsurge, with the market expected to reach USD 6,978.82 million by 2032, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.76% from 2026 to 2032.

data.title: Enlight Research raises valuation and target share price for INVL Technology to EUR 5.05
data.description: Enlight Research, an independent investment research firm, has reevaluated the valuation of INVL Technology, a company specializing in investments in IT businesses. This evaluation comes in light of the release of preliminary results for the year 2025. INVL Technology is in the process of divesting its portfolio of investments. The updated valuation provided by Enlight Research is crucial for investors and stakeholders, as it reflects the company's performance and financial standing. The reevaluation is based on key financial metrics and industry trends. This information will help guide decision-making processes regarding INVL Technology's investments.

data.title: EMA validates indication extension application for Tryngolza® (olezarsen) for the treatment of severe hypertriglyceridemia (sHTG)
data.description: Sobi® revealed today that the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has accepted an application to expand the approved use of Tryngolza® (olezarsen) to include treatment for adult patients with severe hypertriglyceridemia (sHTG) who have triglyceride levels of 880 mg/dL or higher. The application validation marks a significant step in potentially providing a new therapeutic option for individuals with this condition. Tryngolza® is known for its efficacy in managing high triglyceride levels, and this extension could broaden its reach to more patients in need.

data.title: Nanobiotix presents initial results from Phase 2 trial on JNJ-1900 (NBTXR3) for Stage 3 lung cancer.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been highlighted that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This improvement in the job market has resulted in the creation of over 300,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant upturn, with the main index rising by 15% in the last quarter. Experts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, leading to further economic growth and stability.

data.title: MediaTek Vice Chairman and CEO Dr. Rick Tsai to Headline COMPUTEX 2026 with a Keynote on the Future of AI
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Taipei, the Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA) revealed that Dr. Rick Tsai, the Vice Chairman and CEO of MediaTek, is set to give a keynote speech at COMPUTEX 2026. This significant session is slated to take place in the morning of June.

data.title: Share repurchase programme: Transactions of week 13 2026Transaction in Own Shares
data.description: The share repurchase program will be active from February 5, 2026, to January 29, 2027, with Jyske Bank looking to acquire shares worth up to DKK 3 billion during this period. This initiative aligns with Corporate Announcement No. 11/2026 dated February 5, 2026. The program follows the guidelines of the Market Abuse Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of March 8, 2016, collectively known as the "Safe Harbour Rules."

data.title: IQM Secures €50M Financing to Accelerate Global Growth
data.description: A company based in ESPOO, Finland, known as IQM Finland Oy, a prominent player in full-stack superconducting quantum computers, has disclosed a financial development. The company, also referred to as IQM Quantum Computers, has successfully obtained a substantial €50 million financing package from funds and accounts overseen by BlackRock. This financial support is intended to facilitate the advancement of IQM's technology roadmap, bolster research and development initiatives, aid in penetrating new markets, and solidify IQM's position as a leader in the field of quantum computing. The funding arrangement was finalized before the recent announcement made by IQM.
